name: Osteoporosis Medication Codes
description: Medication names and RxNorm codes for osteoporosis treatments including bisphosphonates, RANK ligand inhibitors, parathyroid hormone analogs, selective estrogen receptor modulators, and calcitonin. Used in osteoporosis management in women who had a fracture (OMW) quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Zoledronic acid (Reclast) — IV bisphosphonate for osteoporosis
Denosumab (Prolia) — RANK ligand inhibitor for osteoporosis
Teriparatide (Forteo) — parathyroid hormone analog for osteoporosis
Abaloparatide (Tymlos) — parathyroid hormone-related protein analog for osteoporosis
Raloxifene (Evista) — selective estrogen receptor modulator for osteoporosis
Zoledronic Acid 5 MG/100 ML Intravenous Solution
